name: AriralCampfire
hint_short: A landmark of sorts. A fire hazard.

name: AriralShipGlow
hint_short: VeryMissable_A certain ship's glow, as seen from within your base's windows...

name: BunkerRoom
hint_short: You need to collect a keycard before you can use THESE doors!

name: BunkerSiren
hint_short: A prominent Alpha Bunker feature. Often photographed by accident.

name: CardboardGray
hint_short: A very spooky cutout. Has to be summoned.

name: CaveBlockage
hint_short: A roadblock made of straw.

name: Deer
hint_short: Forest wildlife with an opacity problem.

name: Dingus
hint_short: A friendly feline that is summoned when you type out its name somewhere.

name: DingusDies
hint_short: When you get too eager petting a cat...

name: EriePlush
hint_short: A marked zone. A bag of meat. The right timing.

name: FreezerDoor
hint_short: ...it's the freezer door. You still haven't gotten this one?

name: GhostCar
hint_short: Very rarely, when you approach a transformer...

name: GoatStatue
hint_short: A landmark of a caprine fellow.

name: GreenBunker
hint_short: An inaccessible bunker in a fenced area.

name: KelSelfie
hint_short: The first thing that comes to mind when it comes to security camera photos.

name: KerfurOmega
hint_short: A robotic assistant, painstakingly upgraded.

name: LakeSafe
hint_short: Deep underwater, safeguarding a precious component...

name: MeatPile
hint_short: A trash pile of the unsettling variety.

name: Nest
hint_short: What, don't you have an apiarist suit handy?

name: PaperGray
hint_short: An arts and crafts project made into a prank.

name: Poo
hint_short: The product of a bucket and sheer desperation.

name: RadBarrel
hint_short: A dangerous waste product somewhere in the river.

name: RiverCar
hint_short: A wreck somewhere in the river.

name: Stonehenge
hint_short: An arrangement of stone arches, where the forest thickens.

name: TrailerPark
hint_short: A collection of abandoned bunkhouses and excavators.

name: TreeHouse
hint_short: A home away from home.

name: Village
hint_short: A place to live within a fenced area. Strange markings.

name: WalkingMannequin
hint_short: Weird furniture turned sentient annoyance.

name: WendigoShack
hint_short: A very cozy place to live in if it wasn't abandoned, trashed, and probably cursed.

name: AlienFruit
hint_short: A strange fruit with an odd coloration.

name: AngryErie
hint_short: Missable_When a sentient doll meets searing heat... extremely ill-advised.

name: AntiBreather
hint_short: A cave dweller of sorts. Scary-looking, but not aggressive.

name: AquaWisp
hint_short: A peculiar, sparkling inhabitant of the forest. Comes in aqua.

name: ArgemStatue
hint_short: A familiar statue... (left)

name: AriralDecloaked
hint_short: An impossible photo to take... right?

name: AriralGun
hint_short: Missable_A clumsy alien's weapon.

name: AriralWaterGun
hint_short: An alien cleaning utensil.

name: BlackFog
hint_short: An unnatural fog. May house certain denizens.

name: BlackFogEyesAngy
hint_short: A fog denizen. Angry!

name: BlackFogEyesNormal
hint_short: A fog denizen, somehow not aggravated.

name: BlackHole
hint_short: VeryMissable_A replacement for the sun. A prank gone wrong?

name: BlackWisp
hint_short: A peculiar, sparkling inhabitant of the forest. Comes in black.

name: BlueShrimp
hint_short: Alien fauna. A tasty gift.

name: BlueWisp
hint_short: A peculiar, sparkling inhabitant of the forest. Comes in blue.

name: DreamPhoto
hint_short: Where the world is black and white, where a camera has to be smuggled...

name: ElevatorPic
hint_short: The feed of a certain camera. Must be fast on the draw.

name: ErieStatue
hint_short: A familiar statue... (right)

name: EyeMoon
hint_short: You ever feel like the moon is staring you down?

name: FireTank
hint_short: Missable_A dangerous alien construct. A good source of fuel?

name: FireTankCorpse
hint_short: Missable_The wreck of a flame-breathing machine.

name: FleshCave
hint_short: Somewhere deep, deep underground...

name: FleshRoom
hint_short: The point of view of a friend who's recently disappeared.

name: FlyingSaucer
hint_short: Yet another UFO.

name: Fossilhound
hint_short: Man's best friend. Not so much posthumously.

name: Furfur
hint_short: A forest denizen. May leave effigies around.

name: FurfurAltar
hint_short: A small, hidden altar. A piece, or the full object.

name: GeomOvoid
hint_short: A peculiarly shaped UFO. Descends alone or in a large group. Will flee to the skies if approached.

name: GhostDeer
hint_short: Not quite a corpse... Getting rid of it can cause indigestion.

name: GravityGun
hint_short: A gravity-manipulating tool.

name: GrayBoar
hint_short: Missable_An abominable cyborg, overrunning the forest in search of threats.

name: GrayFigure
hint_short: VeryMissable_An antagonistic alien. Thwarts your attempts to get up close.

name: GreenFire
hint_short: Missable_Will make sure you get a good look at it. Trapped in a fenced area.

name: GreenWisp
hint_short: A peculiar, sparkling inhabitant of the forest. Comes in green.

name: Grunt
hint_short: Somewhere in Nevada...

name: Hell
hint_short: A dimensional dead end... right?

name: HoleDevice
hint_short: VeryMissable_A peculiar device in action and its overseer, within a fenced area.

name: Jellyfish
hint_short: A group of them is called a "smack". Lives in the air instead of the water.

name: Kavotia
hint_short: VeryMissable_A lowly tripedal machine, guarding a certain fenced area.

name: KillerWisp
hint_short: Missable_A forecasted threat. An unwanted forest occupant.

name: LakeGlow
hint_short: As deep underwater as you can go...

name: LambertAltar
hint_short: An altar in a remote place. The shed is the key.

name: MurderKerfur
hint_short: A long lost friend. Part machine and part flesh.

name: MushroomDuende
hint_short: Not fauna nor flora, yet still a living organism.

name: Nisse
hint_short: A folkloric household spirit. Only appears during a certain festivity...

name: Obelisk
hint_short: A warning sign. The bane of well-furnished bases.

name: OrangeWisp
hint_short: A peculiar, sparkling inhabitant of the forest. Comes in orange.

name: PinkWisp
hint_short: A peculiar, sparkling inhabitant of the forest. Comes in pink.

name: Piramid
hint_short: VeryMissable_A pyramidal protector. Permanently disposes of a certain threat.

name: PurpleWisp
hint_short: A peculiar, sparkling inhabitant of the forest. Comes in purple.

name: Ramiel
hint_short: A floating polyhedron. Audible from afar.

name: RedSky
hint_short: A strange environmental event. Tints the night sky.

name: RedWisp
hint_short: A peculiar, sparkling inhabitant of the forest. Comes in red.

name: RozitalBeacon
hint_short: VeryMissable_Unassuming beacons, their signal reaching into the skies...

name: RozitalEngine
hint_short: Missable_An alien engine at the outskirts of the map.

name: RozitalEngineBeam
hint_short: VeryMissable_Wouldn't you photograph a gigantic purple beam on the horizon anyway?

name: RozitalScout
hint_short: VeryMissable_A pack of robotic scouts. Dangerous when provoked.

name: RozitalShip
hint_short: VeryMissable_A passerby UFO of the "imposing and loud" variety.

name: Rufus
hint_short: A cartoonish-looking creature of nightmares, summoned via typing its name.

name: RufusCorpse
hint_short: The corpse of a certain creature of nightmares.

name: ShitDuende
hint_short: An alien who just wants to be left alone.

name: Skerfuro
hint_short: A window passerby. Blink and you'll miss it. No, not the bat.

name: SkyPiece
hint_short: A piece of the sky...

name: Soltomia
hint_short: VeryMissable_A shy robot on vehicle-cleaning duty.

name: SpookyEventPhoto
hint_short: Nothing. There's nothing here. Stop looking.

name: TeleportChamber
hint_short: A slice of a room from a terrible accident. Makes its presence known.

name: TheDoor
hint_short: A mysterious entrance. Closes when you get near.

name: TheEvil
hint_short: When the world is in peril...

name: Thiccfus
hint_short: A... corpulent-looking creature of nightmares, summoned via typing its name.

name: UfoBallfo
hint_short: A run-of-the-mill trio of UFOs.

name: UfoBoofo
hint_short: A run-of-the-mill UFO. Crescent moon shaped.

name: UfoHoel
hint_short: A thick fog comes with it. Has stringent distance requirements.

name: UfoPillfo
hint_short: A run-of-the-mill UFO. Pill shaped.

name: WarpArrow
hint_short: Featured on the believer's poster. Knows when you get near.

name: WhiteWisp
hint_short: A peculiar, sparkling inhabitant of the forest. Comes in white.

name: Wolfgang
hint_short: A certain cave-dwelling, pumpkin-liking arthropod.

name: WolfgangEggs
hint_short: An arthropod in its nest.

name: WolfgangJr
hint_short: The spawn of a cave-dwelling arthropod.

name: WorldBorder
hint_short: At the edge of the world...

name: zPhoto
hint_short: Eventually...
